description: Fix FGAP-050: thread the run's user through the parse->free-text-audit->fabrication-validator chain so the DEC-44 validator (planner/_llm_fabrication_validator.py:validate_candidates) resolves the LLM via get_llm(user=user) -- the SAME django-configured provider the trio's spec calls use (get_llm_logged(author)) -- instead of get_llm() with no user falling through to an unconfigured default and silently no-opping. Add an optional user=None through: validate_candidates (get_llm(user=user)); _freetext_audit.py audit_freetext_flags(849)/audit_freetext(838)/audit_prefill_flags(1368) (forward to the validate_candidates call at 1014); the 12 specs.py parsers that call audit_prefill_flags (+ user=None on the remaining parsers for spec.parse signature compat); the two entry points spec.parse(...) at orchestration.py:270 (user=author) and views.py:619 (user=request.user). Make the cannot-run case FAIL LOUD: in validate_candidates distinguish NoProviderConfiguredError (re-raise -- the backstop genuinely cannot run) from transient/parse errors (keep WARNING + return [] graceful). user defaults None (backward-compatible). No change to get_llm semantics, the resilience loop, or the deterministic free-text audit. Addresses FEAT-010 + FGAP-050; harness SLICE=fabrication_validator.
acceptance_criteria: The DEC-44 fabrication validator resolves its LLM via the run's user, so under the normal user-scoped provider config it runs against the SAME provider the trio's spec calls use -- no fall-through to an unconfigured default, no silent no-op.

A genuine no-provider / cannot-run failure SURFACES (is not swallowed as an empty 'no fabrications found' result); a transient provider error (timeout/rate-limit/network) or a malformed-response parse failure still degrades gracefully (returns no fabricated spans) exactly as today.

Both entry paths thread their user -- the trio run (_run_one_spec's author) and the browser AssistStreamView (request.user); a caller that omits the user keeps today's behavior (backward-compatible, user=None default).
The whole-project gate stays green and the context cascade validates.
